description: OpenClaw prediction market intelligence skill for autonomous AI trading agents — research, arbitrage, screening, and strategy.
rules: Base URL is https://api.rekko.ai/v1 — all endpoint paths are relative to this
Supports both API key auth (Bearer token) and x402 USDC micropayments on Base L2
RekkoClient class handles authentication and x402 payment automatically
Analysis endpoints use async trigger-poll-retrieve pattern
